message:
bd-246d: security budget enforcement tests — 19 tests covering CPU/memory/stack limits

Tests prove PiJS runtime enforces resource budgets deterministically:
- Interrupt budget: zero/small/none/reset/recursive/nested/preserves-state (7 tests)
- Memory limits: large alloc, small alloc, stats tracking, gradual growth (4 tests)
- Stack limits: deep recursion blocked, moderate allowed (2 tests)
- Hostcall timeout: stats tracking (1 test)
- Combined limits: all enforced together, OOM-before-budget (2 tests)
- Error quality: descriptive messages, stack vs budget differentiation (2 tests)
- Promise budget: normal chains unaffected (1 test)

Note: Promise.resolve().then() interrupt is skipped (QuickJS GC assertion bug)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
